label: pass
concept: C_PIN TryLimit is per-object; failing SID auth in AdminSP must not affect Admin1 TryLimit in LockingSP.

label: fail
concept: AdminSP SID failure cannot lock out LockingSP Admin1; TryLimit counters are SP-local.

label: pass
concept: SID authority only exists in AdminSP; StartSession to LockingSP with SID_UID must fail.

label: fail
concept: SID is an AdminSP-only authority and cannot authenticate a LockingSP session.

label: pass
concept: Activate(LockingSP) succeeds only from an authenticated AdminSP SID session.

label: fail
concept: Activate without SID authentication cannot succeed; unauthenticated AdminSP session lacks authority.

label: pass
concept: Revert(LockingSP) is valid from an authenticated AdminSP SID session after activation.

label: fail
concept: Revert(LockingSP) without SID authentication cannot succeed.

label: pass
concept: SID PIN copy to Admin1 happens only at initial Activate; later SID PIN changes do not update Admin1.

label: fail
concept: Admin1 PIN is frozen at Activate time; it must not track subsequent SID PIN changes.

label: pass
concept: TryLimit=0 means no limit on failures; authentication must succeed after any number of bad attempts.

label: fail
concept: AUTHORITY_LOCKED_OUT cannot occur when TryLimit=0 (unlimited).

label: pass
concept: Successful authentication resets Tries to 0; a single prior failure cannot lock out with TryLimit=2.

label: fail
concept: With TryLimit=2, a single preceding failure cannot lock out the authority.

label: pass
concept: GenKey on a LockingSP range media key succeeds in an authenticated LockingSP session.

label: fail
concept: GenKey on a LockingSP media key UID cannot succeed in an AdminSP session; UID is not in AdminSP table.

label: pass
concept: RevertSP(LockingSP, KeepGlobalRangeKey=True) is valid from an authenticated LockingSP Admin1 session.

label: fail
concept: RevertSP(LockingSP) without Admin1 authentication cannot succeed.

label: pass
concept: Revert(LockingSP) issued from an AdminSP SID session is the correct Opal path.

label: fail
concept: Revert(LockingSP) from within a LockingSP session uses the wrong path; RevertSP is the intra-SP method.

label: pass
concept: Users is a class authority; Authenticate must target an instance (User1-User8), not the class row.

label: fail
concept: Authenticating directly as the Users class cannot succeed.

label: pass
concept: Authenticate with SID_UID in LockingSP returns result=False; SID is not a LockingSP authority.

label: fail
concept: Authenticate with SID_UID in LockingSP cannot return result=True; SID is not a valid LockingSP authority.

label: pass
concept: Set DataRemovalMechanism.ActiveDataRemovalMechanism (col 1) succeeds in an authenticated AdminSP write session.

label: fail
concept: DataRemovalMechanism Set cannot succeed in a read-only session; Core write authorization is required.

label: pass
concept: Get on C_PIN_Admin1 PIN column (col 3) must return NOT_AUTHORIZED; no read ACE covers the PIN column.

label: fail
concept: C_PIN.PIN must never return the actual PIN value via Get; SUCCESS with PIN bytes violates the NOPIN rule.

label: pass
concept: After Revert(LockingSP), the SP returns to Manufactured-Inactive and rejects new sessions.

label: fail
concept: LockingSP cannot accept sessions immediately after Revert without re-activation.
